docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLOMA, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, MEEKA AKA MEEKA SCHMALLE DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-23-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-27-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-03-1996

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDOZA, MEEKA AKA MEEKA SCHMALLE
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, JONES, YALE ISAAC (039186), ARB-5 MAILED

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLOMA, BRENDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, MEEKA AKA MEEKA SCHMALLE $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
